channel.title: Radbit SME Hub Blog — AI, Tenders & SME Growth
channel.description: Insights on AI for business, tender opportunities, tax and compliance for Zimbabwean SMEs, SADC export, and digital sovereignty.

item.title: Welcome to the Radbit SME Hub Blog
item.description: Insights and guides for Zimbabwean SMEs — AI tools, tender opportunities, tax compliance, and business growth strategies.
